nasb.text: “The patriarchs became jealous of Joseph and sold him into Egypt. Yet God was with him,

esv.text: “And the patriarchs, jealous of Joseph, sold him into Egypt; but God was with him

cnv.text: “祖先妒忌約瑟，把他賣到埃及去，然而　神與他同在，

ccb.text: “先祖们嫉妒自己的弟弟约瑟，把他卖到了埃及。但上帝一直与他同在，

csbs.text: “先祖们嫉妒约瑟，把他卖到埃及去。可是神与他同在，
